title: [$250] Perf: ReportWelcomeText maps all personal details on every render

labels.name: External
labels.description: Added to denote the issue can be worked on by a contributor

labels.name: Daily
labels.description: KSv2

labels.name: Help Wanted
labels.description: Apply this label when an issue is open to proposals by contributors

labels.name: Bug
labels.description: Something is broken. Auto assigns a BugZero manager.

body:
## Problem `ReportWelcomeText` calls `useMappedPersonalDetails(personalDetailMapper)`, which walks the entire `PERSONAL_DETAILS_LIST` and produces a projected copy of every personal detail on every render. The component only consumes personal details for a handful of participants (via `getPersonalDetailsForAccountIDs(participantAccountIDsExcludeCurrentUser, personalDetails)`), which indexes by account ID — so the full mapping is wasted work. On an account with ~11k personal details (iOS), render time of `ReportWelcomeText` varies from 50 to 500ms (depending on a report), which is a noticeable source of jank when opening reports. ## Solution Swap the mapped hook for raw `useOnyx(ONYXKEYS.PERSONAL_DETAILS_LIST)`. Re-render surface is unchanged (Onyx still uses shallowEqual on the raw collection), but per-render cost drops from ~270ms to a few key lookups (stable ~2ms). ## Fix Tracked by [#88511](https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/88511).
Issue OwnerCurrent Issue Owner: @TMisiukiewicz

  • Upwork Job URL: https://www.upwork.com/jobs/~022046878588320954521
  • Upwork Job ID: 2046878588320954521

Login with a new account and create a Collect workspace. 2. Ensure no billing card is on file. 3. Navigate to Account > Subscription 4. Run the snippet to set nvp_private_firstDayFreeTrial to today's date (May require page refresh): Onyx.set('nvp_private_firstDayFreeTrial', '2026-04-21T09:00:00'); STR: 1. Navigate to the Home page 2. "Time sensitive" section appears at the top of the left column ## Expected Result: Verify the item displays a stopwatch icon Verify the title is "50% off your first year" Verify the supporting text shows a live countdown: "{HH}h {MM}m {SS}sec remaining" ## Actual Result: No expencted format banner. Something like 'Trial: 30 days left!' only. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/81920e2c-7482-4bd2-8bdd-3281a7e5e417 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
